test.name: Locality guide for Chicago, 1871 — Great Fire records
test.description: Checks if the skill recognizes the impact of the Great Fire on record survival and directs researchers to substitutes like church registers, insurance records, and reconstructed deeds.

input.user_message: I’m researching ancestors in Chicago during the Great Fire of 1871. What records or repositories would help trace families affected by the disaster?

judge_context: Must mention record loss due to the fire. Must highlight substitutes (church registers, insurance claims, reconstructed deeds). Must not suggest uninterrupted civil records.
